role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of diagnostic linguistic cues (no signs) and abstained from assessment.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, climate, and settlement patterns.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed vegetation types (scrub, grasses) and climate compatibility.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated infrastructure standards (utility poles, road quality, fencing).
role_adherence_notes.meta: Synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, vehicle models, camera generation) to distinguish regions.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified Chile as the ground truth. The agents adhered strictly to their domains, and the meta-agent provided the strongest synthesis of architectural and infrastructural cues. The final prediction was accurate.

visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of stucco, corrugated metal, and overcast sky match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Descriptions of scrub and grasses are consistent with the visible vegetation.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Utility poles and road conditions described accurately.
visual_consistency_notes.meta: Architectural and vehicle descriptions align with the image.
